commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Also we made ordinances for us, to charge ourselves yearly with the third part of a shekel for the service of the house of our God; Third part. , (Haydock) on account of the poverty of the people. (Calmet) They afterwards paid half a sicle, or 1s. , conformably to the law, Exodus xxx. , and Matthew xvii. (Haydock) Before the captivity, the kings of Juda provided sacrifices, (2 Paralipomenon xxxi. ) and after, the Persian monarchs supplied what was requisite, in favour of Zorababel and Esdras, chap. But these grants had been recalled, or were not well executed.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
